title: Ci release 1.21
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Port of several updates/fixes from various other branches to help maintain the CI setup.

#### How to verify it

All CI tests will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

None

comments.body: If tests fail, may need to cherry pick df84d012a
Update: [I manually added a cirrus-cron job for this branch just now.](https://cirrus-ci.com/settings/repository/5138144844840960)

Oof...no idea why so many integration tests failed.  Very recent testing on other PRs to this branch passed 100%.  I must be something to do with the new VM images (which I dislike doing on an already released branch anyway) :confounded:
I gave up trying to debug [the test problems](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5885498716585984) and reverted the conformance-test + VM image update.  This PR is now just a simple maintenance update.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.21/OWNERS)~~ [cevich,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
